prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated **D16A9** (1.6L SOHC VTEC, 130 PS stock) with a **Hondata S300 v3** standalone ECU, ported and polished cylinder head by **Hasport Performance**, and a **Skunk2 Pro Series intake manifold** for optimized airflow and throttle response.

Forced induction via a **Garrett GT2560R turbocharger** (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with a **GReddy Type-S intercooler**, **HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve**, and a **Custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust** by **Buddy Club Spec II** with a **Mugen 70mm rear muffler** for aggressive tone and reduced backpressure.

Suspension overhaul with **Tein Flex Z coilovers** (adjustable damping, 10kg/mm front springs, 8kg/mm rear springs), **Cusco 22mm front sway bar**, and **Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings** (full set) for improved chassis rigidity and cornering precision.
estetica: Full **J's Racing Type-RR widebody conversion kit** (fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper with integrated canards, and a carbon fiber rear diffuser) to accommodate wider track width and aggressive stance.

OEM+ interior with **Recaro SRD-E bucket seats** (fixed-back, FIA-approved), **Takata Drift III 4-point harnesses**, and a **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel** (350mm, suede) paired with a **NRG quick-release hub** for track-focused ergonomics.

Exterior lighting upgraded to **Vision X Vortex LED headlights** (6000K, projector-style), **Depo Racing JDM-style taillights**, and **Philips D5S HID fog lights** with **Morimoto XB LED bulbs** for a modernized yet OEM-clean look.
